name: appfollow-ai-toolkit
description: Find and track apps, understand what users complain about, and find keyword opportunities — analyst workflows over the AppFollow MCP, using your own OAuth-authenticated session.

interface.shortDescription: App review, rating & ASO analyst workflows over the AppFollow MCP.
interface.longDescription: Turns the live AppFollow MCP server into ready-made analyst workflows: find and track apps, generate feedback reports (KPIs, trends, anomalies, top bugs and requests), and ASO reports (keyword positions, opportunities, an interactive add-keyword loop, metadata suggestions). Uses your own OAuth-authenticated MCP session and your own workspace credits; public tools only, no bundled secrets.
defaultPrompt: Find and track our app on the App Store.
Build a feedback report for the last 30 days.
Run an ASO report and suggest keywords to add.
